subject: A winged green humanoid with clawed hands hovers amid swirling energy, wings spread wide in an aggressive posture
description: A green-skinned humanoid figure with large visible wings spread wide occupies the center of the frame. The figure has clawed hands and a body that merges demonic and Namekian visual cues — horned or ridged cranium, sharp features. The figure is rendered in mid-air with wings fully extended, surrounded by a swirling vortex of green and white energy. The energy spirals outward from the figure's center, creating a dramatic circular composition. No weapon is visible in hand — the threat comes from the figure's posture and the surrounding energy. The mood is menacing and supernatural.
foreground: winged green humanoid with clawed hands, wings spread, amid swirling energy
emotion: menacing dominance — wings spread, energy spiraling, commanding presence
